headline: Kalshi Will Offer Sports-Style Betting on Drug Trial Results
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Kalshi Inc. is expanding in biotechnology by offering wagers on the outcomes of clinical trials and regulatory decisions, giving traders a more direct way to bet on key industry catalysts.Most Read from BloombergThailand Scraps Plan to End Visa-Free Entry for Indian TouristsOpenAI’s First Device Will Be Movable, Screenless Speaker Built as AI CompanionCIA Says AI Drones Give Russian Troops Only 30 Minutes to LiveBeckham’s IM8 Gets $1 Billion From General Catalyst for GrowthOnePlus
